metadata.name: kamiyo
metadata.description: Kamiyo - Agent Identity and Conflict Resolution Protocol for Solana

instructions.name: add_oracle
docs: Add an oracle to the registry
Requires oracle to stake MIN_ORACLE_STAKE as collateral (slashable for bad behavior)

accounts.name: oracle_signer
docs: Oracle must sign to authorize stake deposit

instructions.name: cancel_oracle_withdrawal
docs: Cancel withdrawal request and return to active status

instructions.name: claim_expired_escrow
docs: Claim expired escrow funds
After expiration + grace period (7 days), anyone can trigger this to return funds
- If escrow is Active: funds return to agent (API failed to deliver)
- If escrow is Disputed but unresolved: funds split 50/50 (no oracle consensus reached)
Supports both SOL and SPL token escrows

accounts.name: caller
docs: Anyone can trigger expired escrow claim (incentivizes cleanup)

accounts.name: escrow_token_account
docs: Escrow token account - validated in instruction

accounts.name: agent_token_account
docs: Agent token account - validated in instruction

accounts.name: api_token_account
docs: API token account - validated in instruction

instructions.name: claim_oracle_rewards
docs: Claim accumulated oracle rewards
Oracles earn 1% of escrow amounts for participating in consensus

accounts.name: oracle
docs: Oracle claiming rewards (must be registered)

instructions.name: close_trader_session
docs: Close a trader session. All trade escrows must be settled first.
Updates agent reputation based on session performance.

instructions.name: commit_oracle_score
docs: Commit oracle score hash for commit-reveal voting
Oracle submits SHA256(transaction_id || score || salt) to prevent front-running

accounts.name: oracle
docs: Oracle committing the score hash (must be registered)

instructions.name: complete_oracle_withdrawal
docs: Complete withdrawal after cooldown period

instructions.name: create_agent
docs: Create a new agent identity with PDA

instructions.name: create_trade_escrow
docs: Create a trade escrow within an active trader session.
Locks USDC collateral with time-lock for Hyperliquid position.

instructions.name: create_trader_session
docs: Create a trusted trader session backed by KAMIYO agent identity.
Requires active agent with minimum 20 SOL stake.

instructions.name: deactivate_agent
docs: Deactivate agent and return stake
Note: Agent account is closed and rent returned to owner

instructions.name: finalize_multi_oracle_dispute
docs: Finalize multi-oracle dispute resolution
Calculates consensus from submitted oracle scores and distributes funds
Includes agent stake slashing for frivolous disputes (quality >= 80)
Supports both SOL and SPL token escrows

accounts.name: agent_identity
docs: Optional: Agent identity for stake slashing on frivolous disputes
If provided, stake will be slashed if agent loses dispute

accounts.name: caller
docs: Anyone can call finalize once enough oracles have submitted

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Optional: Treasury to receive protocol fees

accounts.name: escrow_token_account
docs: Escrow token account - validated in instruction

accounts.name: agent_token_account
docs: Agent token account - validated in instruction

accounts.name: api_token_account
docs: API token account - validated in instruction

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury token account for SPL token protocol fees - validated in instruction

instructions.name: increase_oracle_stake
docs: Increase oracle stake (permissionless for stake owner)

instructions.name: init_reputation
docs: Initialize entity reputation

instructions.name: initialize_escrow
docs: Initialize a new escrow for agent-to-API payment

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: Protocol config for pause check

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury to collect escrow creation fee (0.1%)

instructions.name: initialize_oracle_registry
docs: Initialize the oracle registry

instructions.name: initialize_protocol
docs: Initialize protocol configuration with multi-sig (one-time setup)
Requires 3 distinct authority addresses for 2-of-3 multi-sig

instructions.name: initialize_treasury
docs: Initialize treasury for collecting protocol fees and slashed funds

instructions.name: mark_disputed
docs: Mark escrow as disputed

instructions.name: pause_protocol
docs: Pause protocol - emergency stop for all escrow operations
Requires 2-of-3 multi-sig authorization

accounts.name: signer_one
docs: Primary signer (must be one of the multi-sig authorities)

accounts.name: signer_two
docs: Secondary signer (must be one of the multi-sig authorities)

instructions.name: refund_expired
docs: Refund expired escrow to user.

instructions.name: register_oracle
docs: Permissionless oracle self-registration (requires public_registration enabled)

instructions.name: release_funds
docs: Release funds to API (happy path)
Only the agent can release early, API can release after timelock expires
Uses check-effects-interactions pattern for reentrancy safety

accounts.name: caller
docs: Must be the escrow agent or API (after timelock)

accounts.name: escrow_token_account
docs: Escrow token account - validated in instruction

accounts.name: api_token_account
docs: API token account - validated in instruction

instructions.name: remove_oracle
docs: Remove an oracle from the registry and return staked SOL

instructions.name: request_oracle_withdrawal
docs: Request withdrawal from oracle network (starts cooldown)

instructions.name: reset_oracle_registry
docs: Reset and reinitialize a corrupted oracle registry.
Admin-only. Returns excess lamports to admin and reinitializes with empty oracles.

instructions.name: resolve_dispute
docs: Resolve dispute with verifier oracle signature
Uses check-effects-interactions pattern for reentrancy safety
Supports both SOL and SPL token escrows

accounts.name: agent
docs: Agent wallet - MUST match escrow.agent to prevent fund theft

accounts.name: oracle_registry
docs: Oracle registry to validate the verifier is registered

accounts.name: escrow_token_account
docs: Escrow token account - validated in instruction

accounts.name: agent_token_account
docs: Agent token account - validated in instruction

accounts.name: api_token_account
docs: API token account - validated in instruction

instructions.name: set_public_registration
docs: Enable or disable public oracle registration

instructions.name: submit_oracle_score
docs: Reveal oracle score (after commit phase ends)
Oracle reveals score and salt, hash is verified against commitment
Now uses commit-reveal scheme to prevent front-running

accounts.name: oracle
docs: Oracle revealing the score (must be registered)

instructions.name: transfer_admin
docs: Transfer admin rights to a new admin

instructions.name: transfer_protocol_authority
docs: Transfer protocol authority (replace one of the multi-sig signers)
Requires 2-of-3 multi-sig authorization

accounts.name: signer_one
docs: Primary signer (must be one of the multi-sig authorities)

accounts.name: signer_two
docs: Secondary signer (must be one of the multi-sig authorities)

instructions.name: unpause_protocol
docs: Unpause protocol - resume normal operations
Requires 2-of-3 multi-sig authorization

accounts.name: signer_one
docs: Primary signer (must be one of the multi-sig authorities)

accounts.name: signer_two
docs: Secondary signer (must be one of the multi-sig authorities)

instructions.name: update_agent_rep
docs: Update agent reputation (internal use)

accounts.name: oracle_registry
docs: Oracle registry to validate authorized oracles

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority must be the agent owner OR a registered oracle

instructions.name: verify_agent_reputation
docs: Verify an agent's reputation meets thresholds using ZK proof.
This instruction verifies a Groth16 proof that demonstrates an agent:
1. Is a member of a registered agent set (via merkle proof)
2. Has reputation >= min_reputation threshold
3. Has transaction count >= min_transactions threshold
The proof reveals nothing about the actual reputation score or identity.
A nullifier prevents proof replay within the same epoch.
# Arguments
* `proof_a` - G1 point (64 bytes)
* `proof_b` - G2 point (128 bytes)
* `proof_c` - G1 point (64 bytes)
* `agents_root` - Merkle root of registered agents
* `min_reputation` - Minimum reputation threshold (0-100)
* `min_transactions` - Minimum transaction count
* `nullifier` - Unique value to prevent replay

accounts.name: user
docs: The user proving their agent's reputation

accounts.name: nullifier_account
docs: Nullifier account to prevent proof replay.
PDA seeded by ["nullifier", nullifier_bytes].

instructions.name: verify_reputation_tier
docs: Verify a Groth16 ZK proof that a user's reputation score meets a threshold.
This enables privacy-preserving reputation verification without revealing
the actual score.
# Arguments
* `proof_a` - G1 point (64 bytes)
* `proof_b` - G2 point (128 bytes)
* `proof_c` - G1 point (64 bytes)
* `threshold` - The minimum reputation score being proven
* `commitment` - Poseidon commitment binding the score
# Returns
Emits `ReputationTierVerified` event on success.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user proving their reputation tier

instructions.name: withdraw_treasury
docs: Withdraw funds from treasury
Requires 2-of-3 multi-sig authorization (same authorities as protocol pause)

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: Protocol config for multi-sig validation

accounts.name: signer_one
docs: Primary signer (must be one of the multi-sig authorities)

accounts.name: signer_two
docs: Secondary signer (must be one of the multi-sig authorities)

errors.name: InvalidStatus
errors.msg: Invalid escrow status for this operation

errors.name: InvalidTimeLock
errors.msg: Invalid time lock: must be between 1 hour and 30 days

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid amount: must be greater than 0

errors.name: RevealDelayNotMet
errors.msg: Reveal delay not met - wait 5 minutes after first oracle submission

errors.name: RevealPhaseExpired
errors.msg: Reveal phase has expired - dispute must be finalized or claimed as expired

errors.name: InvalidCommitmentHash
errors.msg: Invalid commitment hash - does not match revealed score

errors.name: LaunchAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Launch record already exists for this mint

errors.name: InvalidFundryCoinId
errors.msg: Invalid Fundry coin ID (must be 36-char UUID)

errors.name: LaunchReleaseDelayNotMet
errors.msg: Launch release delay not met (7 days required)

errors.name: LaunchNotActive
errors.msg: Launch is not in active state

errors.name: LaunchNotDisputed
errors.msg: Launch is not in disputed state

errors.name: InsufficientTraderStake
errors.msg: Insufficient stake for trading sessions (minimum 20 SOL)

errors.name: ActiveEscrowsRemaining
errors.msg: Active escrows must be settled before closing session

types.name: AgentIdentity
docs: Agent Identity - PDA-based agent with staking

types.name: EntityReputation
docs: Entity Reputation

types.name: Escrow
docs: Escrow Account

fields.name: disputed_at
docs: Timestamp when dispute was marked (for commit phase start)

fields.name: commit_phase_ends_at
docs: Timestamp when commit phase ends (reveal phase begins)

types.name: OracleCommitment
docs: Oracle commitment for commit-reveal voting

fields.name: commitment_hash
docs: SHA256 hash of (transaction_id + score + salt)

fields.name: revealed
docs: Whether this commitment has been revealed

fields.name: stake_amount
docs: Amount staked by oracle (slashable)

fields.name: violation_count
docs: Count of consensus violations (for removal threshold)

fields.name: total_rewards
docs: Total rewards earned

fields.name: disputes_participated
docs: Performance tracking: disputes participated in

fields.name: consensus_votes
docs: Performance tracking: votes within consensus

fields.name: registered_at
docs: Timestamp when oracle registered

fields.name: withdrawal_requested_at
docs: Timestamp when withdrawal was requested (0 = not requested)

fields.name: status
docs: Status: 0 = active, 1 = pending withdrawal, 2 = suspended

types.name: OracleRegistry
docs: Oracle Registry

fields.name: public_registration
docs: Enable permissionless oracle registration (false = admin-only)

fields.name: total_stake
docs: Total stake across all oracles

types.name: ProtocolConfig
docs: Protocol Configuration - global settings and emergency controls
Uses 2-of-3 multi-sig for critical operations (pause/unpause)

fields.name: authority
docs: Primary authority (can propose actions)

fields.name: secondary_signer
docs: Secondary signer for multi-sig (required for pause/unpause)

fields.name: tertiary_signer
docs: Tertiary signer for multi-sig (required for pause/unpause)

fields.name: required_signatures
docs: Number of required signatures for critical operations (default: 2)

types.name: ReputationNullifier
docs: Reputation proof nullifier - prevents replay of ZK proofs.
Each nullifier can only be used once per epoch.

types.name: Treasury
docs: Protocol Treasury - collects fees and slashed funds

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin who can withdraw (should be multi-sig in production)

fields.name: total_fees_collected
docs: Total fees collected

fields.name: total_slashed_collected
docs: Total slashed funds collected

fields.name: total_withdrawn
docs: Total withdrawn
